Now Hiring – Visakhapatnam (Vizag)

Medical Representative Jobs in Visakhapatnam

Crasenim Pharma is actively hiring Medical Representatives and commission-based pharma sales professionals in Visakhapatnam (Vizag). Join a WHO GMP certified pharmaceutical brand headquartered in Andhra Pradesh and build your career in one of the state's most active pharma markets.

📍 Visakhapatnam / Vizag 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 Experienced Candidates Preferred ✅ WHO GMP Certified Brand
💬 Apply via WhatsApp View All Openings
Territory Overview

Your Territory as an MR in Visakhapatnam

Visakhapatnam is the largest city on the AP coast and one of the most important pharmaceutical markets in the state.

As a Medical Representative based in Visakhapatnam, you will cover a defined territory within the city and its surrounding areas — typically including Gajuwaka, Pendurthi, Bheemunipatnam, and the contiguous Anakapalli stretch. Depending on your seniority, you may also cover institutional clients including corporate hospitals.

The Visakhapatnam pharma market is driven by a large specialist ecosystem — cardiologists, endocrinologists, and chest physicians — making it ideal for promoting products like Telsenim-40, Metsenim-G, and Amoxsenim-CV 625. The city's growing corporate hospital sector (including major private chains) offers strong institutional sales potential.

Key Market Areas

Visakhapatnam City (MVP Colony, Dwaraka Nagar, Jagadamba), Gajuwaka, Pendurthi, Bheemunipatnam, Anakapalli, Chodavaram, Narsipatnam

Why Visakhapatnam is a Great MR Territory

High specialist density, major hospitals with institutional buying, a growing corporate pharma market, and strong brand recognition for quality-certified products. Visakhapatnam rewards experienced MRs who can build strong doctor relationships.

  • Large GP and specialist base across multiple zones
  • High-volume hospital prescriptions for cardiac and diabetic products
  • Growing pharmacy chain penetration for OTC and wellness products
  • Strong acceptance of WHO GMP certified brands at specialist level
  • Opportunity to cover Anakapalli as extended territory
Current Openings

Pharma Job Vacancies in Visakhapatnam

Medical Representative and field sales roles — experienced candidates from Visakhapatnam / Vizag territory strongly preferred.

Medical Representative (Experienced)
📍 Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 💼 Full-Time Permanent 🕒 1–3 Years Pharma Experience
Now Hiring
  • Promote WHO GMP certified Crasenim Pharma medicines to GPs, specialists, hospitals and pharmacies in Vizag
  • Build and maintain strong doctor relationships across your defined Visakhapatnam territory
  • Achieve monthly prescription targets with regular field support from management
  • Earn competitive base salary + performance incentives + travel allowance
Senior Medical Representative – Visakhapatnam
📍 Visakhapatnam / Anakapalli 💼 Full-Time Permanent 🕒 3–5 Years Pharma Sales
Now Hiring
  • Manage key hospital accounts and specialist relationships in Visakhapatnam
  • Cover corporate hospitals, teaching hospitals, and super-speciality clinics
  • Mentor junior MRs and coordinate promotional activities in the Vizag zone
  • Competitive CTC with performance-linked bonuses and career path to ASM
Commission-Based Medical Representative – Vizag
📍 Visakhapatnam 💼 Commission / Freelance 🕒 Any Experience Welcome
Now Hiring
  • Earn commission on every prescription of Crasenim Pharma products you generate
  • No initial investment required — work flexibly alongside existing company if desired
  • Monthly sales incentives and bonuses for hitting volume targets
  • Ideal for MRs already working in Visakhapatnam who want to add a quality brand
Why Crasenim Pharma

Why Join Us as an MR in Visakhapatnam?

Quality Brand

WHO GMP Certified Products

Represent a brand doctors trust. All products manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS under WHO GMP standards — easy to detail and prescribe with confidence at Visakhapatnam's top hospitals.

Strong Incentives

Competitive Pay + Field Rewards

Base salary, monthly incentives for hitting targets, travel allowance, and regular team recognition for top-performing MRs in the Vizag territory.

Career Growth

Clear Progression Path

MR → Senior MR → Area Sales Manager → Regional Sales Manager. We invest in people. Visakhapatnam performers have grown into ASM roles managing teams across AP.

Full Support

Training & Detailing Materials

Regular product training sessions, visual aids, product cards, and sample allocation to support effective detailing at every level of the Visakhapatnam doctor network.

FAQs

MR Jobs in Visakhapatnam – FAQ

Is prior pharma sales experience required for MR jobs in Visakhapatnam?
Experience of 1–3 years in pharmaceutical field sales is preferred for full-time roles in Visakhapatnam. However, for commission-based roles, we welcome motivated candidates even without extensive experience, provided they have a local network in Vizag.
What products would I be selling as an MR in Visakhapatnam?
You would detail and promote Crasenim Pharma's full range: Amoxsenim-CV 625 (antibiotic), Metsenim-G (diabetic), Telsenim-40 (anti-hypertensive), Pansenim-DSR (gastric), Crasenim Bar (pediatric skin), and Crasenim-LC (energy & wellness). All are WHO GMP certified.
What is the commission structure for commission-based MR roles in Vizag?
Commission rates vary by product category and are discussed during the initial conversation with our field manager. Contact us via WhatsApp at +91 99890 74806 for a direct discussion about current rates in the Visakhapatnam territory.
Can I work as an MR in both Visakhapatnam and Anakapalli?
Yes. Depending on experience level and territory size, an MR based in Visakhapatnam may also cover parts of Anakapalli district. Combined territory assignments are discussed during the onboarding process.
How do I apply for a pharma job in Visakhapatnam with Crasenim Pharma?
WhatsApp your name, experience, and current location to +91 99890 74806, or fill the application form on our Careers page. Our HR team will respond within 2 working days.

Apply for MR Jobs in Visakhapatnam Today

Send us your details and our Visakhapatnam HR team will reach out within 2 working days.
